structure_description: 19-section R0152-style market analysis. Front matter (cover/methodology/TOC) → executive summary → 5 thematic sections each opened by a dark divider → AI impact → forecast → strategic implications → methodology endnote.

sections.purpose: Report cover — title, country/industry/year, KIRA branding, report ID, confidential tag
sections.notes: No content generation needed — pure template fill from parsed topic metadata.

sections.purpose: Two-column overview of research approach: primary sources, secondary sources, AI-augmented synthesis, source tagging conventions
Table of contents — generated from this structure plus page counter
sections.notes: Generated at assembly time, not content-gen time.

sections.purpose: Two-page executive summary: page 1 = 4 callouts (market size, growth, concentration, AI uplift) + 2-col narrative + 1 chart; page 2 = 5 strategic implications grid
sections.char_budget_hint: callout num_max=12 chars, narrative_left total_chars_max=1200, implications cards body_max=360 chars each

sections.purpose: Dark-mode chapter break — single thesis statement about the macro backdrop
GDP growth, inflation, urbanization, key policy moves (e.g. housing program, VAT exemption, sovereign wealth fund). One chart per page: macro indicators over time + policy timeline.

chart_type_options.name: 5-year macro trend lines
chart_type_options.use_when: GDP / inflation / urbanization have 5+ years of comparable annual data points

chart_type_options.name: Dual-axis combo (GDP vs inflation, etc.)
chart_type_options.use_when: Two macro series with different units need joint display over time

chart_type_options.name: Policy timeline
chart_type_options.use_when: Key policy actions cluster on a date axis (laws, programs, tariff moves)

sections.purpose: Chapter break — thesis on sector size + recent trajectory
Total market size (USD bn), historical CAGR, forecast CAGR, segment splits (sub-industries from topic). Chart: bar series or stacked bar showing size + segment breakdown.

expand_to_2_pages_if.what_changes_on_expand: Page 2 splits out each material sub-segment with its own size + CAGR row; page 1 keeps the top-line sizing and total trend chart.

chart_type_options.name: 5-year market size trend
chart_type_options.use_when: Total market size has 5+ years of comparable annual data

chart_type_options.name: Segment size bar chart
chart_type_options.use_when: Sub-segments need to be ranked by size in a single period

chart_type_options.name: Stacked bar (size + segment composition)
chart_type_options.use_when: Total size needs to be shown alongside its sub-segment composition across years

sections.purpose: Per-sub-segment deep dive — economics, margin profile, growth drivers. Typically 2-4 sub-segments × half-page each.
sections.skip_if: topic has only one segment (collapse into 08_sector_sizing instead)

chart_type_options.name: Segment ranking bar
chart_type_options.use_when: Sub-segments need to be ranked by size or margin

chart_type_options.name: Segment share donut
chart_type_options.use_when: Sub-segment composition needs a single-period share split

chart_type_options.name: Size vs margin dual-axis
chart_type_options.use_when: Per-segment size and margin both need to be compared over time

sections.purpose: Chapter break — thesis on market structure (consolidating / fragmenting / contested)
HHI concentration chart, top-5 player share, structural commentary, 4-card mini-grid of player headlines
sections.char_budget_hint: HHI viz + sidebar narrative + 4 player mini-cards

expand_to_2_pages_if.what_changes_on_expand: Page 2 adds a top-8 to top-12 mini-matrix (share, segment focus, recent move) below the HHI page; page 1 keeps the HHI + top-5 share + 4-card mini-grid layout.

chart_type_options.name: Top-5 share donut
chart_type_options.use_when: Concentration story is best told as share split in the latest period

chart_type_options.name: HHI / share ranking bar
chart_type_options.use_when: Named competitors need to be ranked by share in a clean horizontal bar

chart_type_options.name: Player positioning bubble
chart_type_options.use_when: Players differentiate on two axes (share × growth, breadth × depth) and size encoding adds revenue context

sections.purpose: Deep profile per leading player — revenue, share, segment focus, recent moves, strategic implication. 1 player per page.
sections.skip_if: fewer than 3 named players identifiable from research

sections.purpose: Chapter break — thesis on what's pulling demand
Distribution mix (modern trade / GT / e-commerce / direct), channel economics, demand pull factors

expand_to_2_pages_if.what_changes_on_expand: Page 2 adds per-channel economics rows (margin, lead time, working-capital profile) for each surfaced sub-channel; page 1 keeps the headline channel-mix chart and demand-pull narrative.

chart_type_options.name: Channel mix stacked bar
chart_type_options.use_when: Channel composition needs to be shown across years or sub-segments

chart_type_options.name: Distribution network diagram
chart_type_options.use_when: Distribution involves multi-hop relationships (importer → distributor → retailer) worth visualizing

chart_type_options.name: Channel ranking bar
chart_type_options.use_when: Channels just need to be ranked by share or growth in a single period

sections.purpose: Recent regulatory actions, planned policy moves, compliance burden, tariffs/standards/incentives
sections.skip_if: topic has minimal regulatory dimension (B2C non-regulated goods)

chart_type_options.name: Regulatory timeline
chart_type_options.use_when: Policy actions cluster on a date axis and the story is sequence + density

chart_type_options.name: Compliance burden bar
chart_type_options.use_when: Compliance cost or rule density needs to be ranked across sub-areas

chart_type_options.name: Regulatory impact heatmap
chart_type_options.use_when: Multiple rules × multiple affected sub-segments need an at-a-glance severity grid

sections.purpose: Dark chapter break — thesis on AI's role in this industry's near-term economics

sections.title_pattern: AI in {{country}} {{industry}}: market sizing + use cases
sections.purpose: Page 1: AI market sizing + adoption trajectory for the industry in-country. Page 2: 4-6 industry-specific AI use cases with effort/impact framing.
sections.char_budget_hint: Use cases as a 2x3 or 3x2 grid; each ~200 chars body

expand_to_2_pages_if.what_changes_on_expand: Page 2 expands from a 2x3 use-case grid to a 2x4 or 3x3 grid with deeper effort/impact callouts; page 1 keeps AI market sizing + adoption trajectory unchanged.

chart_type_options.name: Use-case effort vs impact bubble
chart_type_options.use_when: AI use cases can be placed on an effort × impact matrix with adoption-readiness as size

chart_type_options.name: AI spend by use case
chart_type_options.use_when: Use cases mostly differ in spend share rather than effort/impact positioning

chart_type_options.name: AI adoption share donut
chart_type_options.use_when: Adoption split (deployed / piloted / not started) is the cleanest read

sections.purpose: Forecast chart (USD bn or volume) to year+5, S-curve adoption overlay, base/bull/bear scenario commentary, key sensitivities

chart_type_options.name: 5-year forecast trend line
chart_type_options.use_when: Forecast is a single headline series with base/bull/bear bands

chart_type_options.name: Forecast + adoption dual-axis
chart_type_options.use_when: Forecast pairs naturally with an adoption-rate or penetration series on a second axis

sections.purpose: Source mix breakdown ([primary]/[secondary]/[estimate] percentages), key data anchors, KIRA estimate methodologies disclosed, contact & next research footer
sections.notes: Required — buyers value transparent methodology. Auto-generated from source-tag census of the report.

assembly_rules.page_numbering: Continuous, format '012 / NN' in page-header counter slot — total NN computed at assembly
assembly_rules.section_numbering: section_num shared across all pages of a section (e.g. all Macro pages tagged 'Section 04 · Macro Context')
assembly_rules.divider_placement: Each major chapter opens with a dark divider page (5 dividers in default structure)
assembly_rules.skip_condition_handling: If skip_if condition triggers, omit the section AND recompute page counter for all subsequent sections
